ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in days */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week the program is held */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institute hosting the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the program is held */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees the program can accommodate */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens for the program */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes for the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., MD, PhD, certification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutes" (
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institute */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the institute */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institute */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institute */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institute */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the institute */,
  "institute_type" TEXT /* Type of institute (e.g., medical college, hospital) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the venue */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., auditorium, classroom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the attendee is registered for */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the attendee */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the attendee registered for the program */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of the attendee (e.g., registered, attended, absent) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendees_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the program (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status update (e.g., 'Program postponed due to unforeseen circumstances') */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_status_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the feedback is for */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee providing the feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback comments from the attendee */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the attendee (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., general, technical, organizational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_feedback_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_feedback_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, program coordinator, attendee) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, program coordinator, attendee) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., 'view_programs, edit_programs, manage_users') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the notification is for */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee the notification is sent to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, update, cancellation) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)
